sourceObservation: Derived from the low-battery and sleep rendered samples: a compact header, left circular meter/progress focus, right short facts, and a bottom full-width action/support pill.
layoutSummary: Top object row, left circular progress focus, right compact facts, bottom full-width action/support pill.
allowedEdits: bind progress value/total independently from the visible center label
add onClick to primaryAction only with valid event capability
forbiddenEdits: use emoji/base64/network image or SVG paths not declared in asset-library
turn factColumn into a long list
deleteRules: If support.2 duplicates support.1 or primary.value, delete factMeta and keep the right column vertically centered.
If the main value is naturally split, keep a short centerLabel and put at most two independent fragments in factColumn; do not concatenate a long duration inside the ring.

colorPolicy.budget: one blue meter scene family plus neutral glass action

roles.action: font_on_fourth/tertiary glass material unless action color has semantic meaning

rewriteRules: Do not mix purple sleep colors into the default blue meter template.
For sleep-specific cards, remap the same roles to multi_color_01/06 rather than adding a second hue.
